name: Biscuit
story: Biscuit is the definition of an easy roommate. He was surrendered with his litter and has grown into a calm, biscuit-making gentleman who loves a sunny windowsill.
He settles quickly, travels well, and has never met a lap he didn't like. A quiet home — with or without another cat — would suit him perfectly.

medical.notes: Fully vaccinated. Mild kitten cold in May, fully recovered.

photoAlt: Biscuit, an orange tabby kitten, lying on a woven rug with one paw stretched out
